name: neus-trust
description: Trust infrastructure for agents that act. Verify identity, scoped authority, trust receipts, and Vault-backed secrets before assistants act. One setup for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, and VS Code.

interface.shortDescription: Verify identity, authority, and trust receipts before agents act.
interface.longDescription: Trust infrastructure for agents that act. Verify identity, scoped authority, trust receipts, and Vault-backed secrets before assistants act. One setup for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, and VS Code.
defaultPrompt: Use NEUS to verify identity and scoped authority before taking action.
Use NEUS to check trust receipts for this wallet or organization.
